cell.description: Electrical cell. Must be the name of a json file in the cells library

cells_in_parallel.description: Number of cells connected in parallel

cells_in_series.description: Number of cells connected in series

soc_derate_point.description: State of charge at which to begin derating current.

thermal_derate_curve.description: Thermal derating curve. Must be the name of a json file in the /bms/thermal_derate library
